title: KitchenCraft Colourworks Melamine Plastic Side Plates, Classics Colours, Set of 4
features: These 23 cm (9 Inch) plastic plates are Ideal for salads or light meals
Space-saving, stackable shape and virtually shatter proof design
Can be colour-coded to different dietary requirements
Ideal for road trips, camping or caravans too
description: From the manufacturer KitchenCraft Colourworks Indoor / Outdoor Plastic Snack Plate Set (Classics) Camping and travel classics, refined and refashioned with a soft, pastel palette. With their handy size and high-quality finish, this set of melamine side plates from KitchenCraft Colourworks is the ultimate portable dinnerware set. Lightweight yet substantially sturdy, these shatter-resistant plates take all the worry out of alfresco dining. Pack into a picnic basket, or hand out at BBQs and children’s parties, without fretting about them coming back in pieces. Use them indoors, too, as easy-clean, everyday dinnerware. Each plate is finished in a shade from the Colourworks Classics palette – Classic Green, Blue, Grey and Cream – inspired by timeless classical design, refined and refashioned for the contemporary home. Not only do they look beautiful, the varied colours mean that fussy little eaters can pick their favourite colour, and when catering for varied diets at big gatherings, it’s easy to keep meat and dairy separate. Build your own bespoke portable dinner set by combining these small picnic plates with matching larger plates, bowls and drinks tumblers, all in the same smart, understated colour scheme. Set of 4 picnic plates Diameter: 23cm (9 inches) 100% BPA-free Dishwasher safe Indispensable Outdoor Dinnerware Designed in the Colourworks Classics Palette With their muted, refined colour scheme, these camping plates enhance any understated kitchen, caravan, or portable dining collection. They are a great match for other Colourworks Classics products, as well as KitchenCraft’s Living Nostalgia range of vintage-inspired homeware. Highly resistant Melamine is a strong, virtually unbreakable material, meaning your new travel plates will see you through many outdoor adventures. The finish will stand up to knife scratches well, and is highly resistant to chips and cracks – making them a great transitional choice for growing children. Nice and practical A snack-sized 23 cm (9-inch) diameter makes these plates ideal for salads and sides, or lighter portions for the diet-conscious. They’re also great for helping little ones learn how to use grown-up plates safely. You can even colour-code them to help picky eaters, and keep everyone’s special diet requirements happy. Dishwasher Safe Enjoy your picnic, barbecue or trip to the beach, without stressing over getting home before the leftovers crust onto the plates. Just pop your plates in the dishwasher to return them to their pristine selves, ready for next alfresco dinner. Elegant and Practical Portable Tableware Stylise your camping kitchenware with KitchenCraft’s Colourworks selection of salad plates, bowls and drinks tumblers. All have been specifically designed for travelling and outdoor activities. They’re made of travel-friendly melamine, and have space-saving stackable designs, so they pack up easily into cars and caravans. The melamine dinnerware range is available in the soft, muted Classics palette, or the bold-and-cheerful 'Brights' palette. Which one will you choose? The Colourworks Classics Collection KitchenCraft believes that even the most common, everyday tools can be improved upon- so they’ve turned their heads to reinventing the all-time kitchen classics. Old-school ‘tried and tested’ designs have been refined with soft-but-sturdy silicone coatings and exciting new features for precision pouring, measuring, scooping and serving, to help keep your kitchen running with modern-day efficiency. Available in the simple but sophisticated shades of classic green, cream, blue or grey, the Colourworks Classics collection has a whole host of essential gadgets for the chef who believes cooking should be an elegant affair. Discover everything from vegetable peelers to soft pan mats, soup ladles to 3-in-1 spaghetti spoons, simply by typing “Colourworks Classics” into your Amazon search bar.
